packageRules.description: github-actions: pin SHAs and auto-merge after the 7-day quarantine.
bats submodules: group and auto-merge after the quarantine.

flake.lock (nixpkgs) bumps: auto-merge once CI is green. CI validates the exact locked toolset and nix flake check (treefmt --ci) goes red if a bumped formatter would change output, so a green run is safe to merge.

customManagers.description: SchemaStore master HEAD tracker for the JSON Schema URL consumed by .ci/check-jsonschema. SchemaStore publishes no releases/tags, so master HEAD is the only signal; the global 7-day minimumReleaseAge applies.
